return [[int(j) for j in list(S())] for i in range(n)]

while dq: cy, cx = dq.popleft() for i, j in ((1, 0), (-1, 0), (0, 1), (0, -1)): ny = cy + i nx = cx + j if 0 <= ny < h and 0 <= nx < w and not visited[ny][nx]: if grid[ny][nx] != grid[cy][cx]: bi[int(grid[sy][sx] == grid[ny][nx])] += 1 dq += [(ny, nx)] visited[ny][nx] = 1

for i, j in ((1, 0), (-1, 0), (0, 1), (0, -1)): ny = cy + i nx = cx + j if 0 <= ny < h and 0 <= nx < w and not visited[ny][nx]: if grid[ny][nx] != grid[cy][cx]: bi[int(grid[sy][sx] == grid[ny][nx])] += 1 dq += [(ny, nx)] visited[ny][nx] = 1
if 0 <= ny < h and 0 <= nx < w and not visited[ny][nx]: if grid[ny][nx] != grid[cy][cx]: bi[int(grid[sy][sx] == grid[ny][nx])] += 1 dq += [(ny, nx)] visited[ny][nx] = 1
